_comment: PUBLIC Firebase web config for project flightproject-299a8. Not a secret (it ships in client JS); security is enforced by Firestore rules + Auth. The build (flightwatch/dashboard.py) reads this when FARO_FIREBASE_CONFIG is unset. Until apiKey + appId are filled, the site stays in localStorage demo mode. Get apiKey + appId from Firebase console -> Project settings -> your Web app (register one if needed). Get vapidKey from console -> Project settings -> Cloud Messaging -> Web Push certificates.
